title: Selecting the source of finance
summary: 9609 AS — evaluating and justifying finance choices for scenarios.
learningObjectives: Weigh pros and cons of alternatives.

simpleExplanation.title: Making the finance decision
simpleExplanation.summary: Selection weighs cost, risk, control, and suitability. The best choice aligns with business objectives and capacity to repay.
steps: Check cash flow can service debt.

sections.content: **Selecting finance** (5.2.4) is classic **evaluation** material. Structure **option → advantage → disadvantage → recommendation**.
